ci_support_linux_64_python3.10.____cpyth:
c_compiler:
- gcc
c_compiler_version:
- '14'
c_stdlib:
- sysroot
c_stdlib_version:
- '2.17'
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cxx_compiler:
- gxx
cxx_compiler_version:
- '14'
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
numpy:
- '2'
pin_run_as_build:
  python:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
python:
- 3.10.* *_cpython
target_platform:
- linux-64
zip_keys:
- - c_compiler_version
  - cxx_compiler_version
name: nlopt
raw_meta_yaml:
schema_version: 1

context:
  version: "2.10.1"

package:
  name: nlopt
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  url: https://github.com/stevengj/nlopt/archive/v${{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 30d13ce16da119db3e987784f7864e35a562ec62c186352fae55cd003e6c58ff
  patches:
   - d8bd7cf4.patch

build:
  number: 2

requirements:
  build:
    - cmake
    - swig
    - ${{ compiler('c') }}
    - ${{ stdlib('c') }}
    - ${{ compiler('cxx') }}
    - if: build_platform != target_platform
      then:
        - python
        - numpy
        - cross-python_${{ target_platform }}
    - if: unix
      then:
        - make
  host:
    - python
    - numpy
  run:
    - python
  run_exports:
    - ${{ pin_subpackage('nlopt', upper_bound='x.x') }}

tests:
  - python:
      imports:
        - nlopt

about:
  homepage: http://ab-initio.mit.edu/nlopt
  license: LGPL-2.1-or-later
  license_file: COPYING
  summary: nonlinear optimization library

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - jschueller
